nasb.text: The good man brings out of his good treasure what is good; and the evil man brings out of his evil treasure what is evil.

esv.text: The good person out of his good treasure brings forth good, and the evil person out of his evil treasure brings forth evil.

cnv.text: 良善的人從他良善的心發出良善，邪惡的人從他邪惡的心發出邪惡。

ccb.text: 善人心存良善，就从他里面发出良善；恶人心存邪恶，就从他里面发出邪恶。

csbs.text: 好人从他心里所存的善，发出善来；坏人从他心里所存的恶，发出恶来。
